title: Strata Doc: Query Executor (Advanced)
description: Add support for comparison operators (, , , ) and logical operators (, ). Implement a basic query optimizer.

title: Strata Doc: Core Engine
description: Create StrataDoc class. Implement insert(collection, doc) and findById(collection, id).

title: Strata Doc: Secondary Indexing
description: Implement secondary indexes to allow efficient querying on fields other than the primary key. Create index management logic.

title: Strata Doc: Query Executor
description: Implement find(collection, query) using the scan() method. Support simple equality checks first.

title: Strata Doc: Protocol & ID Gen
description: Define how to encode Collection + ID into KV Keys. Implement ObjectId generation.
